name: Vito & Nick's
teaser: The publicly acceptable Chicago thin-crust to love. Dive bar atmosphere is perfect, semi-on-the-way to the airport.
review: This is the Chicago thin-crust that is publicly acceptable to love. And that's fine because it's great, the dive bar atmosphere is perfect, and it's semi-on-the-way to the airport.
headsUp: The dive bar atmosphere is half the experience. Embrace the old-school vibe.
update: Semi-on-the-way to the airport. A great last meal.
